message:
Expand config, runtime, and main binary with new capabilities

- config.rs: Add 30 lines of config expansion including output format
  preferences, pattern caching settings, runtime tuning parameters
- runtime.rs: Implement pattern cache warming, add execution context
  propagation for better error attribution, extend runtime metrics
- main.rs: Major expansion (350+ lines) adding new subcommands for pattern
  testing, output format selection, batch processing mode, implement
  streaming output for large result sets, add verbose diagnostics mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
